title: Beautiful Skies
description: Beautiful Skies: Resource pack that redesigns the skyboxes with 4K renders.
body:
**Beautiful Skies** is a resource pack that completely transforms the atmosphere of your world with stunning 4K-resolution skyboxes. Whether you’re exploring during the day, gazing at the stars, or watching the sun set, every moment feels cinematic and immersive.  

## Features
- Ultra high-resolution 4K sky textures
- Smooth transitions between day, night, sunrise, and sunset  
- A more vibrant and atmospheric sky for exploration and building  
- Perfect for both survival gameplay and cinematic screenshots  

## Screenshots
> ![Daytime Sky](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/IvcoTvL0/images/8d16aa0c02ffe4564614882f0f5c8e286837fd30.png)
> *Bright and clear skies during the day.*

> ![Sunrise Horizon](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/IvcoTvL0/images/8437d6795c1ae355e15dd00063e9898e70123513.png)
> *Golden tones painting the horizon as the sun sets.*

> ![Starry Night](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/IvcoTvL0/images/02ea9f04c62f445cb6c1442699412a0012096e1d.png)
> *A breathtaking view of the night sky filled with stars.*

> ![End Cosmic Nebula](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/IvcoTvL0/images/ee1e31ec5294514ccd2e232a84569a142cf6edc3.png)
> *The End becomes a vast deep-space void, enhancing the atmosphere.*
